title: Who is Asukas father
wikitext:
[]: Who is Asuka´s father? Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 17, 2010 1:48 am In the manga it´s mentioned that Asuka´s mother bought some semen from a spermbank and that she was made in a test tube. She also says it´s a high quality sperm sample from a brilliant scientist . It would´ve been funny if a male from the Eva character cast was Asuka´s biological father. Possibilities: Gendo Unlikely, but he controls Marduk which made Asuka an Eva pilot. Possible. Fuyutsuki This guy has no wife. More likely than Gendo Maybe Gendo forced him to Keel: I don´t know if he´s considered a scientist, really. But since the sperm sample was high-quality and SEELE is the elite, we should consider him. Misato´s father: Same as Fuyutsuki except the wife part. Regarding canon: It´s not really mentioned in the anime, but it´s shady as hell. What do you think?

[]: Post by Ornette » Tue Aug 17, 2010 2:00 am In canon, Asuka's dad remarries and presumably is still married by Episode 22 when Asuka talks to her step-mom on the phone. It's very obvious that Asuka had a father from the scenes in the hospital from episode 22.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 17, 2010 2:07 am Ornette wrote: In canon, Asuka's dad remarries and presumably is still married by Episode 22 when Asuka talks to her step-mom on the phone. It's very obvious that Asuka had a father from the scenes in the hospital from episode 22.

[]: Post by xark » Tue Aug 17, 2010 2:08 am That's just something the manga made up. Nothing in the manga really applies to anime-canon. In the anime, the scene in episode 22 wherea man and a woman (doctor) are talking - that's her father and her step-mother. She talks to the step-mother again on the phone but her father is never really expanded upon. In the proposal, it's mentioned that he died but I don't think the actual show ever says that. But just for fun - Gendo: incest all across the board

[]: Post by soda7777777 » Tue Aug 17, 2010 5:14 am It was never expanded on in the tv series. All we know is that his name is Langley, he's a doctor, and he remarried after Asuka's mother died. Other than that, we just don't know.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Tue Aug 17, 2010 9:16 am The one thing we do know is that her father is a Caucasion American. Asuka is 1/4 Japanese and has natural red hair. Her mother was 1/2 Japanese and 1/2 German. It takes two recessive genes to get red hair. Asuka's mother had the recessive gene from the German side and Asuka's father must either have had red hair or had a recessive gene for it.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 17, 2010 9:48 am Grimmjow wrote: The one thing we do know is that her father is a Caucasion American. Asuka is 1/4 Japanese and has natural red hair. Her mother was 1/2 Japanese and 1/2 German. It takes two recessive genes to get red hair. Asuka's mother had the recessive gene from the German side and Asuka's father must either have had red hair or had a recessive gene for it.

[]: Post by xark » Tue Aug 17, 2010 9:59 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: Gendo had red hair when he was young.

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 17, 2010 10:21 am xark wrote: No he didn't! Haha, he has dark brown hair throughout the series.

[]: Post by Oz » Tue Aug 17, 2010 11:14 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: But they never showed Gendo as a kid.

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 17, 2010 12:10 pm Where are we going with this?

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Aug 17, 2010 12:28 pm ZapX wrote: Where are we going with this?

[]: Post by ZapX » Tue Aug 17, 2010 12:35 pm No gingers allowed. I'm looking at you, Birdy and Jimbo.
